product_information.product_name: Olaplex No. 0 Intense Bond Builder 155 ML
product_information.description:
Het product
The No.0 Intensive Bond Building Hair Treatment has been redesigned for fast, targeted application
Hoe werkt het?
It features an easy-to-use nozzle that primes the hair and delivers the highest concentration of patented Bond Building Technology of any OLAPLEX at-home product.
Use as the first step in a two-part at-home system with No.3 Hair Perfector (sold separately) to strengthen and repair all types of damaged hair.
Scientifically Proven: 68% More Repair & 3X Stronger Hair*
*When used as a two-part system in just one use.
Number of Applications: The No.0 bottle should last 3-6 applications based on the length and density of your hair."
Gebruik
Use the 2-step system with the N.3 once a week or 2/3 times a week for damaged hair. Use on dry hair and wet each section thoroughly. For all hair types and textures, especially for damaged hair.
Ingrediёnten
Water (Aqua/Eau), Bis-Aminopropyl Diglycol Dimaleate, Phenoxyethanol, Sodium Benzoate
Meer over
all hair types, PH value, Vegan, Animal testing freem Gluten Free, Free from nuts, paraben free, free from phosphates, sulfate free
